title: Rep. Eric Swalwell Resigns Amid Misconduct Allegations
summary: Rep. Eric Swalwell resigns from the U.S. House following sexual misconduct allegations.
charlotte_impact: Highlights accountability and ethical standards for elected officials, impacting public trust and political stability.

title: Trump Threatens Military Action Against Iranian Ships
summary: Trump vows to sink Iranian ships approaching a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions.
charlotte_impact: Heightens geopolitical risks and potential for military conflict in a critical global waterway.

title: Trump Continues Feud with Pope Leo Over Political Comments
summary: Trump refuses to back down from a feud with Pope Leo, asserting the pontiff should stay out of politics.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the intersection of politics and religion, influencing diplomatic relations and public opinion.

title: Péter Magyar Vows to Investigate Corruption After Election Win
summary: Péter Magyar promises to pursue those who plundered Hungary after a significant election victory.

title: Pride Flag Flies at Stonewall After Administration Reversal
summary: The Pride Flag is permitted to fly at Stonewall National Monument following a reversal by the Trump Administration.

title: Minnesota County Probes Federal Agents' Removal of US Citizen
summary: A Minnesota county investigates the removal of a US citizen from his home by federal agents as a possible kidnapping.

title: Stepbrother Charged with Murder in Cruise Death
summary: Stepbrother charged with sexual assault and murder in the cruise ship death of Anna Kepner, officials report.

title: Lynette Hooker Feared Husband Before Death
summary: Messages reveal Lynette Hooker's concerns about her husband Brian: "I can't be out there with him."

title: Powerful Storm Threatens U.S. Islands in Western Pacific

title: Colombia to Cull Hippo Population Founded by Drug Lord
